Welcome to Mina's webpage!

E-poster at SOBP 2020

April 30, 2020

The 2020 Society of Biological Psychiatry (SOBP) Annual Meeting was supposed to be my first presensation abroad, but it was canceled due to the COVID-19. If you are a member of SOBP, please check out the ePoster Gallery! My presentation titled “Neural Correlates of Goal-Directed Control in Video Game Addiction and Alcohol Use Disorder” can be found there.

Won the SNU Graduate Scholarship for Basic Science Research

March 2, 2020

I have won my first scholarship as a graduate student! Unfortunately, due to COVID-19, the scholarship ceremony was not held this year.

My work presented at SfN poster session!

October 21, 2019

My first project using the Adolescent Brain and Cognitive Development (ABCD) study was presented at a poster session in the Society for Neuroscience 2019 meeting (Chicago, IL). The poster was presented by the second author, Hyeonjin Kim.

Graduated from Seoul National University :)

August 29, 2019

From 2015 to 2019, I pursued my studies in Psychology and Brain-Mind-Behavior at Seoul National University. Now, as a graduate student in the Computational Clinical Science Laboratory, I am excited for the opportunity to conduct remarkable research alongside my PI, Dr. Woo-Young Ahn, and my fellow colleagues! ;-)

Presentation at the 2019 Annual Meeting of the Korean Society for Cognitive Science

May 25, 2019

This was my first time presenting at a conference! The title of my presentation was “Identifying behavioral and neural predictors of caffeinated soda intake in childhood using a large database from the ABCD study.”

graduate student in CCS lab at Seoul National University
